summary: Scope expanded to refine My Account details and subscription behavior: My Account must store user profile fields directly on the account page, support plan options including multi-term (monthly/6-month/year) with no auto-renew, display plan expiration after payment, and enforce expiration handling (downgrade to Free on expiry + 1-week grace period before auto-deletion). Newsletter opt-in is captured and stored in-app; disclosures/refund/legal statements remain accessible in-app with updated rules.

existing_features.title: Internet Identity authentication
existing_features.description: Frontend integrates Internet Identity for login and actor creation; backend supports authenticated access patterns.

existing_features.title: User profile setup modal
existing_features.description: ProfileSetupModal to collect/store initial user profile data after authentication; hook for fetching current user profile.

existing_features.title: Dashboard and landing pages
existing_features.description: React pages for landing and authenticated dashboard flow with shared app layout.

existing_features.title: Mood check-in tracking UI
existing_features.description: Mood check-in card and mood hook to capture and display mood-related entries.

existing_features.title: Journaling (list + editor)
existing_features.description: Journal section with list and editor components plus journal hook for creating/editing entries.

existing_features.title: Coping tools page and components
existing_features.description: Tools page including breathing timer, grounding 5-4-3-2-1 exercise, and thought reframing prompt components.

existing_features.title: Motoko backend authorization & access control mixins
existing_features.description: Backend authorization modules (MixinAuthorization, access-control) integrated into main canister for protected calls.

existing_features.title: Frontend-backend integration scaffolding
existing_features.description: Generated backend declarations and frontend actor/util hooks (useActor, backend.ts, backend.d.ts) to call canister methods.

existing_features.title: Build/deploy template for ICP + React
existing_features.description: Project build template including Dockerfile, deploy scripts, canister configs, workspace setup, and image processing scripts.

existing_features.title: Generated branding assets
existing_features.description: Pre-generated public assets (favicon, hero, logo, icons) included under frontend/public/assets/generated.

existing_features.title: Generated background image set
existing_features.description: Additional pre-generated background images (beach, clouds, landscape, ocean) included under frontend/public/assets/generated for use in layout/hero/background components.

existing_features.title: Expanded landing page sections
existing_features.description: Landing page now includes modular sections/components such as Hero, Value Proposition, Features & Benefits blocks, Social Proof, Privacy & Safety, Pricing, FAQ, and CTA/header/section wrappers for richer pre-auth marketing content.

existing_features.title: Testimonials page and testimonials data hook
existing_features.description: Adds a dedicated TestimonialsPage and a useTestimonials hook to surface testimonial/social-proof content beyond the landing-page Social Proof section.

existing_features.title: My Account page routing and navigation rename
existing_features.description: Adds a dedicated MyAccountPage and updates app routing/navigation so the entry previously labeled "Dashboard" (next to Tools) is now "My Account" with a defined route.

existing_features.title: Plan state hook and Free-plan UI gating (dashboard/tools) with journaling limits
existing_features.description: Introduces plan/state management via a frontend plan hook and updates relevant pages/components (e.g., Dashboard/Tools/Journal) to support plan-based UI gating, including Free-plan journaling usage limits.

existing_features.title: Add plan selection support for the following explicit plan options (including term variants) and persist the selected option in the backend: Free $0; Basic $9.99 a month; Basic $59.94 for 6 months (No auto renewals); Basic $109.89 for a year (No auto renewals); Premier $24.99 a month; Premier $149.94 for 6 months (no auto renewals); Premier $274.89 for a year (no auto renewals).

Implement plan expiration lifecycle behavior: after payment is recorded as received for a non-Free plan, compute and store the plan expiration date; display it on My Account. On the expiration date, automatically downgrade the account to Free-plan access. Keep the account open for 1 additional week (grace period) with Free-plan access, then automatically delete the account and all associated user data from the system after the grace period ends.

Update the My Account page UI so the top "Account Information" box becomes an editable form that collects and displays: Full Name, Date of Birth (MM/DD/YYYY), City, State, Email address, Phone number (optional), Plan enrolled in, and Plan expiration date. Provide Save behavior that persists changes in the backend and rehydrates correctly on refresh.

Update authenticated navigation so the user has three clear clickable top-level destinations available in-app: Dashboard, My Account, Tools; ensure they are visible/accessible from within the My Account experience as described.

Add a My Account UI control for the newsletter question: "Would you like to join our Weekly Newsletter?" with Yes/No selection, and persist the user’s selection to the backend (recorded automatically when the answer is Yes).

Update the in-app disclosure/legal content to add the new rules described by the user, including plan non-auto-renew language for the new plan options and the expiration/downgrade/grace-period/auto-deletion policy.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement three plan-based dashboards (Free/Basic/Premier) and start with Free plan dashboard build
My Account flow: collect registration info (name, city/state, DOB MM/DD/YYYY, email, optional phone), select plan, and capture payment info

Billing disclosure + enforcement rules: recurring draft on 1st; $10 late fee on 6th; loss of access if unpaid by 15th + $15 late fee; lock by 27th; unlock via support email + invoice; require password update after payment/unlock

Email the user a signed copy of the disclosure/terms upon agreement, including warning disclosure (not a replacement for professional care), privacy policy, refund policy, and other required legal statements

Free plan entitlements and limits: allow Mood check-in, Grounding exercises, Community resources, "What is Trauma?" 5-part guide + activities, and Journaling limited to 2x/week and max 8/month; ensure Tools reflect only these items

Post-account-creation UX: show "account created" message then prompt weekly newsletter signup; if yes collect first name, DOB (MM/DD), email; regardless of choice log user out and route to Splash login
Lifecycle automation: after 6 weeks on Free plan send upgrade email offering 10% off coupon SAVE10% valid for 5 days with terms reflected

Update My Account page to store full profile fields, add non-auto-renew plan tiers (monthly/6mo/year), show plan expiration, enforce expiry downgrade to Free + 1-week grace then auto-delete, and store newsletter opt-in; update disclosure rules

Update the backend user account data model to persist the following fields per authenticated user: full name, date of birth (MM/DD/YYYY as text), city, state, email address, phone number (optional), newsletter opt-in (yes/no), selected plan option (including term/pricing variant), plan start timestamp (when payment is recorded as received), and plan expiration timestamp. Ensure the data is retrievable and updatable by the authenticated caller.

Implement any required Motoko state migration so existing stored user profiles (currently only containing name) are safely upgraded to the new persisted account/profile structure with sensible defaults for newly added fields.

architectural_notes: Frontend: React + Vite + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS with shadcn-ui component library.
Auth: Internet Identity is used for authentication; frontend actor hooks manage authenticated canister calls.
Backend: Motoko canister includes authorization/access-control modules to guard endpoints.
Monorepo/build template includes Dockerfile, deploy.sh, and ICP canister YAML configs; includes scripts to prune/resize images.
Build template now includes a full pnpm-workspace monorepo scaffold with dedicated backend/frontend canister.yaml templates and a broad pre-vendored shadcn-ui component set for rapid UI composition.
Frontend build template includes custom ESLint rules to enforce Internet Identity provider usage and to prevent BigInt usage in query keys.
Branding direction: use the original provided logo and keep the same logo font (do not redesign/recreate the logo font styling).
Process note: pause/redesign of the landing page is deferred until the user provides additional content to add.
Branding direction reaffirmed: use the user-uploaded original logo as-is (same font/style); do not recreate or alter it.
Process note reaffirmed: do not redesign the landing page yet; user will add more sections in the next chat before any redesign work.
Generated background images now also include optimized .optim.png variants for runtime use (e.g., via SanctuaryBackground), alongside the original .dim_1920x1080 assets.
Added an additional generated background image asset for the Testimonials page (butterfly sunrise), stored under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Add plan-based access control/entitlements (feature gating) tied to selected subscription plan, including journaling usage limits for Free plan.
Introduce billing policy handling and account status state machine (active, past_due, suspended, locked) with time-based late fee rules and reactivation flow.
Add transactional email support for disclosures/legal statements and lifecycle marketing emails (e.g., 6-week upgrade offer with expiring coupon).

Billing/subscription model updated: plan selection includes term options (monthly/6-month/year) with no auto-renew; system must track plan expiration date, downgrade access to Free on expiration, allow 1-week grace period, then auto-delete account after grace if not renewed.

My Account page becomes the canonical in-app storage/display for user profile fields (name, DOB, city/state, email, optional phone), plan enrolled, plan expiration date, and newsletter opt-in preference; disclosures/refund/legal statements are attached in-app rather than emailed.

generatedImages.description: Generated background image asset for Testimonials page (butterfly sunrise)
